data_type_evidence: experiment_code.py:566-572 - generate_code_baseline() uses random.random() < baseline_success_rate to determine pass/fail outcomes rather than actual LLM code generation
experiment_code.py:575-584 - generate_code_with_facg() similarly uses random.random() < facg_success_rate to simulate outcomes
experiment_code.py:108-196 - create_synthetic_dataset() creates hand-crafted synthetic problems with hardcoded test cases
experiment_code.py:15-16 - random.seed(42) and np.random.seed(42) used for reproducible random sampling
experiment_code.py:644-651 - Hyperparameter configs define fixed success rates (0.65 baseline, 0.75-0.95 FACG) that determine outcomes via random sampling
experiment_code.py:199-251 - load_code_contests_dataset() attempts to load real dataset but the experimental outcome is still simulated via random sampling
experiment_code.py:325-387 - load_mbpp_dataset() attempts to load real dataset but experimental evaluation is simulated
